validation.details: No whitespace errors reported. The folder is untracked, so this was supplemented with a direct whitespace check.

check English and Chinese F-number counts match

unresolved_issues: OCR damaged the classical-dichotomy restriction line.

The exact steady-state convention for constants in the Rep-MMB model(linear) implementation is unresolved.
